    Methods in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader that return Parameter
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Parameter<T>
    Parameter.parseAndSet(String valueString)
    Parses the given String representation and sets the parsed value as the new value of this parameter.
    Parameter<T>
    Parameter.removeValue()
    Removes the set value of this parameter.
    Parameter<T>
    Parameter.set(T value)
    Sets the value of this parameter.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    WidgetBuilder.addOptionalParameter(String key, Parameter<?> parameter)
    Adds an optional widget parameter.
    protected void
    WidgetBuilder.addRequiredParameter(String key, Parameter<?> parameter)
    Adds a required widget parameter.

  • Uses of Parameter in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters

    Subclasses of Parameter in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AnchorParameter
    Overrides the AnchorParameter.parse(String) method to map the String representation to a Widget.Anchor value and stores it.
    class 
    ColorParameter
    Overrides the ColorParameter.parse(String) method to parse a hexadecimal color value or individual RGB values.
    class 
    ImageResourceParameter
    Overrides the ImageResourceParameter.parse(String) method to read the image at the given path relative to the resources folder.
    class 
    NumberParameter<T extends Number & Comparable<T>>
    Defines the contract for a parameter which contains comparable numbers.
    class 
    StringParameter
    Overrides the StringParameter.parse(String) method to remove a single pair of surrounding quotation marks (if present) from the given String value using the public static method StringParameter.stripQuotationMarks(String).

  • Uses of Parameter in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters.numbers

    Subclasses of Parameter in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters.numbers
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    FloatParameter
    Represents a number parameter for Float values.
    class 
    IntegerParameter
    Represents a number parameter for Integer values.
